016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ObjectUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.lang.reflect.Method;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.function.*;
025import java.util.logging.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug.format.*;
030
031import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
032
033/**
034 * Debug configuration with class/method targeted rules.
035 */
036public class DebugConfig {
037
038   /** Represents no debug config. */
039   public abstract class Void extends DebugConfig {
040      Void(BeanStore beanStore) {
041         super(beanStore);
042      }
043   }
044
045   /**
046    * Builder class.
047    */
048   public static class Builder {
049
050      private final BeanStore beanStore;
051      private final Map<String,DebugRule> rules = new LinkedHashMap<>();
052      private Predicate<HttpServletRequest> conditional = x -> "true".equalsIgnoreCase(x.getHeader("Debug"));
053      private DebugFormat defaultFormat;
054      private Level defaultLevel = Level.INFO;
055      private boolean defaultCacheBodies = false;
056
057      /**
058       * Constructor.
059       *
060       * @param beanStore The bean store.
061       */
062      protected Builder(BeanStore beanStore) {
063         this.beanStore = beanStore;
064         defaultFormat = beanStore.getBean(BasicTextFormat.class).orElseGet(BasicTextFormat::new);
065      }
066
067      /**
068       * Adds a rule.
069       *
070       * @param target The target key.
071       * @param value The rule spec.
072       * @return This object.
073       */
074      public Builder rule(String target, Consumer<DebugRule.Builder> value) {
075         var b = DebugRule.create();
076         value.accept(b);
077         rules.put(target, b.build());
078         return this;
079      }
080
081      /**
082       * Sets default format.
083       *
084       * @param value The value.
085       * @return This object.
086       */
087      public Builder defaultFormat(DebugFormat value) {
088         defaultFormat = value;
089         return this;
090      }
091
092      /**
093       * Sets default level.
094       *
095       * @param value The value.
096       * @return This object.
097       */
098      public Builder defaultLevel(Level value) {
099         defaultLevel = value;
100         return this;
101      }
102
103      /**
104       * Sets conditional rule predicate.
105       *
106       * @param value The value.
107       * @return This object.
108       */
109      public Builder conditional(Predicate<HttpServletRequest> value) {
110         conditional = value;
111         return this;
112      }
113
114      /**
115       * Sets default cache-body flag.
116       *
117       * @param value The value.
118       * @return This object.
119       */
120      public Builder defaultCacheBodies(boolean value) {
121         defaultCacheBodies = value;
122         return this;
123      }
124
125      /**
126       * Builds this object.
127       *
128       * @return A new object.
129       */
130      public DebugConfig build() {
131         return new DebugConfig(this);
132      }
133   }
134
135   /**
136    * Creates a builder.
137    *
138    * @param beanStore The bean store.
139    * @return A new builder.
140    */
141   public static Builder create(BeanStore beanStore) {
142      return new Builder(beanStore);
143   }
144
145   private final BeanStore beanStore;
146   private final Predicate<HttpServletRequest> conditional;
147   private final DebugFormat defaultFormat;
148   private final Level defaultLevel;
149   private final boolean defaultCacheBodies;
150   private final Map<String,DebugRule> rules;
151
152   /**
153    * Constructor.
154    *
155    * @param beanStore The bean store.
156    */
157   public DebugConfig(BeanStore beanStore) {
158      this(create(beanStore));
159   }
160
161   /**
162    * Constructor.
163    *
164    * @param builder The builder.
165    */
166   protected DebugConfig(Builder builder) {
167      beanStore = builder.beanStore;
168      conditional = builder.conditional;
169      defaultFormat = builder.defaultFormat;
170      defaultLevel = builder.defaultLevel;
171      defaultCacheBodies = builder.defaultCacheBodies;
172      rules = Map.copyOf(builder.rules);
173   }
174
175   /**
176    * Resolves debug for resource-level requests.
177    *
178    * @param context The context.
179    * @param req The request.
180    * @return A debug result.
181    */
182   public DebugResult resolve(RestContext context, HttpServletRequest req) {
183      return resolveInternal(context == null ? null : context.getResourceClass(), null, req);
184   }
185
186   /**
187    * Resolves debug for operation-level requests.
188    *
189    * @param context The context.
190    * @param req The request.
191    * @return A debug result.
192    */
193   public DebugResult resolve(RestOpContext context, HttpServletRequest req) {
194      return resolveInternal(context.getContext().getResourceClass(), context.getJavaMethod(), req);
195   }
196
197   @SuppressWarnings({
198      "unused" // Method and parameter are reflectively available to subclasses; kept for API stability.
199   })
200   private DebugResult resolveInternal(Class<?> resourceClass, Method method, HttpServletRequest req) {
201      var enabled = false;
202      if (req != null) {
203         if (isTrue(cast(Boolean.class, req.getAttribute("Debug"))))
204            enabled = true;
205         else
206            enabled = conditional.test(req);
207      }
208      var cacheBodies = defaultCacheBodies && enabled;
209      return new DebugResult(enabled, defaultFormat, defaultLevel, cacheBodies);
210   }
211
212   /** Returns bean store. */
213   protected BeanStore beanStore() { return beanStore; }
214
215   /**
216    * Returns the configured rule for the specified target key, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
217    *
218    * @param target The target key.
219    * @return The configured rule, or <jk>null</jk>.
220    */
221   public DebugRule getRuleFor(String target) {
222      return rules.get(target);
223   }
224}
